description: Program-memory v3 safety and tolerability observations for one harvested program bundle.

required_fields.name: arm_id
required_fields.description: Stable arm identifier within the study.

required_fields.name: harm_term
required_fields.description: Normalized harm term or safety concept.

required_fields.name: harm_category
required_fields.description: Safety category such as metabolic or EPS.

required_fields.name: result_summary
required_fields.description: Short normalized summary of the safety observation.

required_fields.name: source_document_id
required_fields.description: Source document row anchoring the observation.

optional_fields.name: serious_flag
optional_fields.description: Serious adverse event indicator when reported.

optional_fields.name: discontinuation_flag
optional_fields.description: Discontinuation due to harm indicator when reported.
